name: vizhi
description: Local mission control for coding agents.

scripts.start: npm run build && node dist/cli.js serve
scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/cli.js serve --demo
scripts.router: npm run build && node dist/cli.js router
scripts.prompt:set: npm run build && node dist/cli.js set-prompt-template
scripts.prompt:favorite: npm run build && node dist/cli.js set-favorite-template
